name: anisette-workers
description: Run @lbr77/anisette-js on Cloudflare Workers. Generates Apple Anisette headers via WASM unicorn ARM64 emulation.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --target=browser --format=esm --outdir=dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && bun scripts/extract-wasm.mjs dist/anisette.wasm && bun scripts/patch-wasm-memory.mjs dist/anisette.wasm && mv dist/anisette.wasm.patched dist/anisette.wasm
